abilities.name: Eureka!
abilities.description: Grants Tinker an item-based cooldown reduction, up to a cap. Item Cooldown Reduction Cap: 60%. Item Cooldown Factor Threshold: 1%. Cooldown Factor per Int Threshold: 3.

abilities.name: Laser
abilities.description: Blinds and damages the unit-targeted enemy. Laser is now an area-targeted ability and applies all ability effects to enemy units centered around the primary enemy unit. Cast Range: 600. Damage: 75/150/225/300 (125/200/275/350). Miss Chance: 100%. Blind Duration: 3/3.5/4/4.5. Current Health Reduction: (13%). Max Health Reduction: (13%). Cooldown: 19/18/17/16. Mana Cost: 95/105/115/125 (85/94/103/112).

abilities.name: March of the Machines
abilities.description: Even though the laboratory has since been sealed off, the ability to radio in robotic drones is still in working order. Cast Range: 300. Max Travel Distance: 1800. Robot Collision Radius: 50. Detonate Radius: 150. Detonate Damage: 13/22/31/40. Duration: 6 (7). Cooldown: 35/33/31/29. Mana Cost: 100/120/140/160 (90/108/126/144).

abilities.name: Defense Matrix
abilities.description: Applies an all damage barrier and grants bonus status resistance to the affected allied unit. Cast Range: 700. Status Resist Bonus: 15%/20%/25%/30% (75%/80%/85%/90%). Duration: 15. Cooldown: 20. Mana Cost: 90/105/120/135 (81/94/108/121).

abilities.name: Warp Flare
abilities.description: Fires a damaging flare towards an enemy unit and applies a debuff that reduces both the affected enemy unit's cast range and attack range. Cast Range: 700. Damage: 150. Attack Range Factor: 0.6. Cast Range Factor: 0.6. Debuff Duration: 2. Max Teleport Distance: 2000. Cooldown: 15. Mana Cost: 80 (72).

abilities.name: Keen Conveyance
abilities.description: Can teleport himself directly to an allied hero's current location. Fountain Target Distance: 1500. Initial Cooldown: 20. Min Target Distance: 70. Max Target Distance: 800. Cooldown: 50. Mana Cost: 75 (67).

abilities.name: Rearm
abilities.description: A new battery here, another set of rockets there, Boush continually improves on existing technology. Channel Time: 2.75/2/1.25. Ability Cooldown Factor: 0. Cooldown: 7/6/5. Mana Cost: 100/150/200 (90/135/180).
